package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_map_any_json_decode_in_hot_path: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag JSON decoding into map[string]any in hot paths where typed structs avoid reflection churn.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule593NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario593Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule593NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
